```{r}
    var_id <- variety2prot[[v]]

    out_dir <- file.path(out_base, v, san(var_id))
    dir.create(out_dir, recursive=TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)

    out_path <- file.path(
        out_dir,
        paste0("normalized_peptides_", v, "_", san(var_id), "_unique.tsv"))

    fwrite(dt, out_path, sep="\t")

    message("💾 Exported final inter-batch normalized file → ",
        normalizePath(out_path))
}

cat("\n🎯 Peptide pipeline completed with inter-batch normalization.\n")




#HOG0026275
# =============================================================
# PEPTIDE PIPELINE — Multi-batch, adaptive correction, TSN, smoothing,
# with z-scored and non-z-scored heatmaps per variety (unique peptides only + PDF export)
# =============================================================

library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(stringr)

# ---------------------- USER PARAMETERS ----------------------
pept_dir   <- "../../../R_import/Hv4/MW_pipe/peptides"
out_base   <- "../../../R_export/Hv4/peptides_HOG0026275"
dir.create(normalizePath(out_base, mustWork = FALSE), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ortho_file <- "../../../R_Data/Hv4/single_inter/Hv4_allBatches_interBatchNorm.csv"
target_hog <- "N1.HOG0026275"
min_val       <- 0.1
missing_limit <- 9
smooth_k      <- 3

# =============================================================
# STEP 1 — Load ortholog mapping for the target HOG
# =============================================================
message("📂 Loading ortholog mapping from: ", ortho_file)
full_ortho <- fread(ortho_file)

id_cols <- grep("_protein_ID$", names(full_ortho), value = TRUE)
subset_dt <- full_ortho[, c("HOG", id_cols), with = FALSE]
result <- subset_dt[HOG == target_hog]
if (nrow(result) == 0) stop("❌ Target HOG not found in ortholog table.")
message("✅ Found entry for ", target_hog)

# =============================================================
# STEP 2 — Define file–variety–protein mapping
# =============================================================
file_variety_map <- data.table(
    File = c(
        "peptides_b1", "peptides_b2", "peptides_b3", "peptides_b4", "peptides_b5",
        "peptides_b6", "peptides_b7", "peptides_b8", "peptides_b9", "peptides_b10",
        "peptides_b11", "peptides_b12", "peptides_b13", "peptides_b14", "peptides_b15",
        "peptides_b16", "peptides_b17", "peptides_b18", "peptides_b19", "peptides_b20"
    ),
    Variety = c(
        "RGT","ACCO","SLA","OUN","AA","DUL","VAL","MIL","137","PED",
        "BAR","PRO","DIA","MOR","TRU","FT11","OPA","ALE","KRO","HAN"
    )
)

protein_cols <- names(result)[grepl("_protein_ID$", names(result))]
variety_from_result <- sub("_protein_ID$", "", protein_cols)
variety_protein_map <- data.table(
    Variety = variety_from_result,
    Protein_ID = as.character(result[1, ..protein_cols])
)

variety_map_full <- merge(file_variety_map, variety_protein_map, by = "Variety", all.x = TRUE)
qc_path <- file.path(out_base, "QC_file_variety_protein_map.csv")
fwrite(variety_map_full, qc_path)
message("✅ Variety-to-protein mapping saved to ", qc_path)

file2batch  <- setNames(variety_map_full$Variety, gsub("^peptides_", "", variety_map_full$File))
variety2prot <- setNames(variety_map_full$Protein_ID, variety_map_full$Variety)

# =============================================================
# STEP 3 — Processing configuration
# =============================================================
batch_thresholds <- list(
    "RGT"=2,"ACCO"=2,"AA"=2,"DUL"=1.8,"VAL"=2,"MIL"=2,"PED"=1.8,"PRO"=2,
    "DIA"=3.5,"MOR"=1.6,"ALE"=2,"KRO"=1.8,"HAN"=1.8,"SLA"=3,"OUN"=2,
    "BAR"=1.8,"TRU"=2,"FT11"=2.5,"OPA"=1.8,"137"=1.6
)

batch_specific_rules <- list(
    "ACCO"=list(list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6))),
    "TRU" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6)),
                list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "RGT" =list(list(target=1, neighbors=c(2))),
    "PRO" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4))),
    "DUL" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "MOR" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "PED" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "OPA" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "137" =list(list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "HAN" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "DIA" =list(list(target=2, neighbors=c(1,3))),
    "KRO" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3,6)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(3,6)))
)

batches_1to9  <- c("b1","b3","b5","b7","b9","b11","b13","b15","b17","b19")
batches_10to18 <- c("b2","b4","b6","b8","b10","b12","b14","b16","b18","b20")

# =============================================================
# STEP 4 — Helper functions
# =============================================================
san <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)
edge_ma <- function(x, k=3){
    if (all(is.na(x))) return(x)
    h <- floor(k/2)
    x_ext <- c(rep(x[1], h), x, rep(x[length(x)], h))
    y <- stats::filter(x_ext, rep(1/k, k), sides=2)
    as.numeric(y[(h+1):(length(y)-h)])
}
smooth_matrix <- function(mat, k=3) t(apply(mat, 1, edge_ma, k=k))
select_batch_channels <- function(dt, stem) {
    if (stem %in% batches_1to9) {
        message("📥 Selecting columns: Reporter.intensity.corrected.[1–9]")
        cols <- grep("Reporter.intensity.corrected.[1-9]", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    } else if (stem %in% batches_10to18) {
        message("📥 Selecting columns: Reporter.intensity.corrected.1[0–8]")
        cols <- grep("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1[0-8]", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    } else stop("❌ Unknown batch: ", stem)
    cols[1:min(length(cols),9)]
}

# =============================================================
# STEP 5 — Main processing loop
# =============================================================
pept_files <- list.files(pept_dir, pattern="^peptides_b.*\\.txt$", full.names=TRUE)
message("Detected ", length(pept_files), " peptide files.")
if (!length(pept_files)) stop("❌ No peptide files found at ", normalizePath(pept_dir))

for (fp in pept_files) {
    message("\n--------------------------------")
    message("📄 File: ", basename(fp))
    dt <- fread(fp, sep="\t", header=TRUE, quote="", data.table=TRUE)
    if (!"Proteins" %in% names(dt)) { message("⚠️ No 'Proteins' column — skipped."); next }

    stem  <- tolower(gsub("^peptides_|\\.txt$", "", basename(fp)))
    batch <- file2batch[[stem]]
    if (is.null(batch)) { message("⚠️ No variety mapping for ", stem); next }

    var_id <- variety2prot[[batch]]
    if (is.null(var_id) || is.na(var_id)) { message("⚠️ Missing protein ID for ", batch); next }

    thr   <- batch_thresholds[[batch]]; if (is.null(thr)) thr <- 2
    rules <- batch_specific_rules[[batch]]
    message("🔍 Variety: ", batch, " → Protein ID: ", var_id)

    chans_raw <- select_batch_channels(dt, stem)
    message("✅ Channels:\n   ", paste(chans_raw, collapse="\n   "))
    setnames(dt, chans_raw, paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw)))
    chans <- paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw))

    keep <- apply(dt[, ..chans], 1, function(x) sum(is.na(x) | x < min_val) < missing_limit)
    dt <- dt[keep]; if (!nrow(dt)) next

    dt[, ProteinCount := lengths(strsplit(Proteins, ";"))]
    dt <- dt[ProteinCount == 1]
    dt[, ProteinCount := NULL]
    message("✅ Retained ", nrow(dt), " unique peptides (1 protein only)")
    if (!nrow(dt)) { message("⚠️ No unique peptides found — skipping."); next }

    mat <- as.matrix(dt[, ..chans]); mode(mat) <- "numeric"

    n_imp <- 0; n_rep <- 0
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(mat))) {
        row <- mat[i,]
        if (!is.null(rules)) {
            for (r in rules) {
                t <- r$target; neigh <- row[r$neighbors]
                neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh>0]
                if (length(neigh)) {
                    mu <- mean(neigh)
                    val <- row[t]
                    if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) { row[t] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp + 1 }
                    else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) { row[t] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep + 1 }
                }
            }
        }
        target_idx <- if (is.null(rules)) integer(0) else vapply(rules, `[[`, numeric(1), "target")
        for (j in seq_along(row)) {
            if (j %in% target_idx) next
            neigh <- row[intersect(c(j-1,j+1),seq_along(row))]
            neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh)&neigh>0]
            if (!length(neigh)) next
            mu <- mean(neigh)
            val <- row[j]
            if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) { row[j] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp + 1 }
            else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) { row[j] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep + 1 }
        }
        mat[i,] <- row
    }
    message(sprintf("✅ %s — Corrected: %d (imputed %d, replaced %d)", batch, n_imp+n_rep, n_imp, n_rep))

    col_sums <- colSums(mat, na.rm=TRUE)
    gm <- median(col_sums, na.rm=TRUE)
    fac <- gm / col_sums
    for (j in seq_along(chans)) mat[,j] <- mat[,j] * fac[j]
    message("✅ TSN applied.")

    mat <- smooth_matrix(mat, k=smooth_k)
    message("✨ Edge-replicated moving-average smoothing applied (k=3)")

    out_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(out_base, batch, san(var_id)), mustWork=FALSE)
    dir.create(out_dir, recursive=TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
    if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) stop("❌ Cannot create output folder: ", out_dir)

    hit <- grepl(var_id, dt$Proteins, fixed=TRUE)
    n_hit <- sum(hit)
    message("🔎 Found ", n_hit, " unique peptides for ", var_id)
    if (n_hit == 0) next

    sub_mat <- log2(mat[hit,,drop=FALSE] + 1)
    rownames(sub_mat) <- make.unique(dt$Sequence[hit])
    meta_cols <- intersect(c("Sequence","Proteins","Leading razor protein","Start position","End position"), names(dt))
    sub_meta <- dt[hit, ..meta_cols]
    out_tab <- cbind(sub_meta, as.data.table(sub_mat))

    # --- Heatmaps (PNG + PDF)
    heat_cols <- colorRampPalette(c("#4579F1","white","#D73020"))(130)
    if (nrow(sub_mat) >= 2) {
        png_file_z <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_zscore_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_z <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_zscore_unique.pdf"))
        ph_z <- pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="row", cluster_rows=TRUE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                         color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                         main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, var_id),
                         filename=png_file_z, width=10, height=8)
        # PDF version
        pdf(pdf_file_z, width=10, height=8)
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="row", cluster_rows=TRUE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, var_id))
        dev.off()

        row_order <- if (!is.null(ph_z$tree_row$order)) rownames(sub_mat)[ph_z$tree_row$order] else rownames(sub_mat)
        hm_mat <- sub_mat[row_order,,drop=FALSE]

        png_file_noz <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_noZ_sameOrder_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_noz <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_noZ_sameOrder_unique.pdf"))
        pheatmap(hm_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, "(no z-score, same order)"),
                 filename=png_file_noz, width=10, height=8)
        # PDF version
        pdf(pdf_file_noz, width=10, height=8)
        pheatmap(hm_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, "(no z-score, same order)"))
        dev.off()
    } else if (nrow(sub_mat) == 1) {
        png_file_single <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_single_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_single <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_single_unique.pdf"))
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase peptides —", batch, "(single unique peptide)"),
                 filename=png_file_single, width=8, height=3)
        pdf(pdf_file_single, width=8, height=3)
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase peptides —", batch, "(single unique peptide)"))
        dev.off()
    }

    # --- Export normalized peptide table ---
    out_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("normalized_peptides_", batch, "_", san(var_id), "_unique.tsv"))
    fwrite(out_tab, out_path, sep="\t")
    message("💾 Exported normalized unique-peptide table → ", normalizePath(out_path))
}

message("\n🎯 Completed peptide-level normalization for all batches (unique peptides only + PDF heatmaps).")







#N1.HOG0030174
# =============================================================
# PEPTIDE PIPELINE — Multi-batch, adaptive correction, TSN, smoothing,
# with z-scored and non-z-scored heatmaps per variety (unique peptides only + PDF export)
# =============================================================

# ---------------------- USER PARAMETERS ----------------------
pept_dir   <- "../../../R_import/Hv4/MW_pipe/peptides"
out_base   <- "../../../R_export/Hv4/peptides_HOG0030174"
dir.create(normalizePath(out_base, mustWork = FALSE), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ortho_file <- "../../../R_Data/Hv4/single_inter/Hv4_allBatches_interBatchNorm.csv"
target_hog <- "N1.HOG0030174"
min_val       <- 0.1
missing_limit <- 9
smooth_k      <- 3

# =============================================================
# STEP 1 — Load ortholog mapping for the target HOG
# =============================================================
message("📂 Loading ortholog mapping from: ", ortho_file)
full_ortho <- fread(ortho_file)

id_cols <- grep("_protein_ID$", names(full_ortho), value = TRUE)
subset_dt <- full_ortho[, c("HOG", id_cols), with = FALSE]
result <- subset_dt[HOG == target_hog]
if (nrow(result) == 0) stop("❌ Target HOG not found in ortholog table.")
message("✅ Found entry for ", target_hog)

# =============================================================
# STEP 2 — Define file–variety–protein mapping
# =============================================================
file_variety_map <- data.table(
    File = c(
        "peptides_b1", "peptides_b2", "peptides_b3", "peptides_b4", "peptides_b5",
        "peptides_b6", "peptides_b7", "peptides_b8", "peptides_b9", "peptides_b10",
        "peptides_b11", "peptides_b12", "peptides_b13", "peptides_b14", "peptides_b15",
        "peptides_b16", "peptides_b17", "peptides_b18", "peptides_b19", "peptides_b20"
    ),
    Variety = c(
        "RGT","ACCO","SLA","OUN","AA","DUL","VAL","MIL","137","PED",
        "BAR","PRO","DIA","MOR","TRU","FT11","OPA","ALE","KRO","HAN"
    )
)

protein_cols <- names(result)[grepl("_protein_ID$", names(result))]
variety_from_result <- sub("_protein_ID$", "", protein_cols)
variety_protein_map <- data.table(
    Variety = variety_from_result,
    Protein_ID = as.character(result[1, ..protein_cols])
)

variety_map_full <- merge(file_variety_map, variety_protein_map, by = "Variety", all.x = TRUE)
qc_path <- file.path(out_base, "QC_file_variety_protein_map.csv")
fwrite(variety_map_full, qc_path)
message("✅ Variety-to-protein mapping saved to ", qc_path)

file2batch  <- setNames(variety_map_full$Variety, gsub("^peptides_", "", variety_map_full$File))
variety2prot <- setNames(variety_map_full$Protein_ID, variety_map_full$Variety)

# =============================================================
# STEP 3 — Processing configuration
# =============================================================
batch_thresholds <- list(
    "RGT"=2,"ACCO"=2,"AA"=2,"DUL"=1.8,"VAL"=2,"MIL"=2,"PED"=1.8,"PRO"=2,
    "DIA"=3.5,"MOR"=1.6,"ALE"=2,"KRO"=1.8,"HAN"=1.8,"SLA"=3,"OUN"=2,
    "BAR"=1.8,"TRU"=2,"FT11"=2.5,"OPA"=1.8,"137"=1.6
)

batch_specific_rules <- list(
    "ACCO"=list(list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6))),
    "TRU" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6)),
                list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "RGT" =list(list(target=1, neighbors=c(2))),
    "PRO" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4))),
    "DUL" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "MOR" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "PED" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "OPA" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "137" =list(list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "HAN" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "DIA" =list(list(target=2, neighbors=c(1,3))),
    "KRO" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3,6)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(3,6)))
)

batches_1to9  <- c("b1","b3","b5","b7","b9","b11","b13","b15","b17","b19")
batches_10to18 <- c("b2","b4","b6","b8","b10","b12","b14","b16","b18","b20")

# =============================================================
# STEP 4 — Helper functions
# =============================================================
san <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)
edge_ma <- function(x, k=3){
    if (all(is.na(x))) return(x)
    h <- floor(k/2)
    x_ext <- c(rep(x[1], h), x, rep(x[length(x)], h))
    y <- stats::filter(x_ext, rep(1/k, k), sides=2)
    as.numeric(y[(h+1):(length(y)-h)])
}
smooth_matrix <- function(mat, k=3) t(apply(mat, 1, edge_ma, k=k))
select_batch_channels <- function(dt, stem) {
    if (stem %in% batches_1to9) {
        message("📥 Selecting columns: Reporter.intensity.corrected.[1–9]")
        cols <- grep("Reporter.intensity.corrected.[1-9]", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    } else if (stem %in% batches_10to18) {
        message("📥 Selecting columns: Reporter.intensity.corrected.1[0–8]")
        cols <- grep("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1[0-8]", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    } else stop("❌ Unknown batch: ", stem)
    cols[1:min(length(cols),9)]
}

# =============================================================
# STEP 5 — Main processing loop
# =============================================================
pept_files <- list.files(pept_dir, pattern="^peptides_b.*\\.txt$", full.names=TRUE)
message("Detected ", length(pept_files), " peptide files.")
if (!length(pept_files)) stop("❌ No peptide files found at ", normalizePath(pept_dir))

for (fp in pept_files) {
    message("\n--------------------------------")
    message("📄 File: ", basename(fp))
    dt <- fread(fp, sep="\t", header=TRUE, quote="", data.table=TRUE)
    if (!"Proteins" %in% names(dt)) { message("⚠️ No 'Proteins' column — skipped."); next }

    stem  <- tolower(gsub("^peptides_|\\.txt$", "", basename(fp)))
    batch <- file2batch[[stem]]
    if (is.null(batch)) { message("⚠️ No variety mapping for ", stem); next }

    var_id <- variety2prot[[batch]]

    # 🚨 ADDED SAFETY CHECK: skip empty protein IDs
    if (is.null(var_id) || is.na(var_id) || var_id == "") {
        message("❌ Missing or empty Protein ID for ", batch, " — skipping.")
        next
    }

    thr   <- batch_thresholds[[batch]]; if (is.null(thr)) thr <- 2
    rules <- batch_specific_rules[[batch]]
    message("🔍 Variety: ", batch, " → Protein ID: ", var_id)

    chans_raw <- select_batch_channels(dt, stem)
    message("✅ Channels:\n   ", paste(chans_raw, collapse="\n   "))
    setnames(dt, chans_raw, paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw)))
    chans <- paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw))

    keep <- apply(dt[, ..chans], 1, function(x) sum(is.na(x) | x < min_val) < missing_limit)
    dt <- dt[keep]; if (!nrow(dt)) next

    dt[, ProteinCount := lengths(strsplit(Proteins, ";"))]
    dt <- dt[ProteinCount == 1]
    dt[, ProteinCount := NULL]
    message("✅ Retained ", nrow(dt), " unique peptides (1 protein only)")
    if (!nrow(dt)) { message("⚠️ No unique peptides found — skipping."); next }

    mat <- as.matrix(dt[, ..chans]); mode(mat) <- "numeric"

    n_imp <- 0; n_rep <- 0
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(mat))) {
        row <- mat[i,]
        if (!is.null(rules)) {
            for (r in rules) {
                t <- r$target; neigh <- row[r$neighbors]
                neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh>0]
                if (length(neigh)) {
                    mu <- mean(neigh)
                    val <- row[t]
                    if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                        row[t] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp + 1
                    } else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) {
                        row[t] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep + 1
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        target_idx <- if (is.null(rules)) integer(0) else vapply(rules, `[[`, numeric(1), "target")
        for (j in seq_along(row)) {
            if (j %in% target_idx) next
            neigh <- row[intersect(c(j-1,j+1), seq_along(row))]
            neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh > 0]
            if (!length(neigh)) next
            mu <- mean(neigh)
            val <- row[j]
            if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                row[j] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp + 1
            } else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) {
                row[j] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep + 1
            }
        }

        mat[i,] <- row
    }

    message(sprintf("✅ %s — Corrected: %d (imputed %d, replaced %d)", batch, n_imp+n_rep, n_imp, n_rep))

    col_sums <- colSums(mat, na.rm=TRUE)
    gm <- median(col_sums, na.rm=TRUE)
    fac <- gm / col_sums
    for (j in seq_along(chans)) mat[,j] <- mat[,j] * fac[j]
    message("✅ TSN applied.")

    mat <- smooth_matrix(mat, k=smooth_k)
    message("✨ Edge-replicated moving-average smoothing applied (k=3)")

    out_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(out_base, batch, san(var_id)), mustWork=FALSE)
    dir.create(out_dir, recursive=TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
    if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) stop("❌ Cannot create output folder: ", out_dir)

    hit <- grepl(var_id, dt$Proteins, fixed=TRUE)
    n_hit <- sum(hit)
    message("🔎 Found ", n_hit, " unique peptides for ", var_id)
    if (n_hit == 0) next

    sub_mat <- log2(mat[hit,,drop=FALSE] + 1)
    rownames(sub_mat) <- make.unique(dt$Sequence[hit])
    meta_cols <- intersect(c("Sequence","Proteins","Leading razor protein",
                             "Start position","End position"), names(dt))
    sub_meta <- dt[hit, ..meta_cols]
    out_tab <- cbind(sub_meta, as.data.table(sub_mat))

    # --- Heatmaps (PNG + PDF)
    heat_cols <- colorRampPalette(c("#4579F1","white","#D73020"))(130)
    if (nrow(sub_mat) >= 2) {
        png_file_z <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_zscore_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_z <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_zscore_unique.pdf"))
        ph_z <- pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="row", cluster_rows=TRUE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                         color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                         main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, var_id),
                         filename=png_file_z, width=10, height=8)

        pdf(pdf_file_z, width=10, height=8)
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="row", cluster_rows=TRUE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, var_id))
        dev.off()

        row_order <- if (!is.null(ph_z$tree_row$order))
            rownames(sub_mat)[ph_z$tree_row$order]
        else rownames(sub_mat)
        hm_mat <- sub_mat[row_order,,drop=FALSE]

        png_file_noz <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_noZ_sameOrder_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_noz <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_noZ_sameOrder_unique.pdf"))
        pheatmap(hm_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, "(no z-score, same order)"),
                 filename=png_file_noz, width=10, height=8)

        pdf(pdf_file_noz, width=10, height=8)
        pheatmap(hm_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, "(no z-score, same order)"))
        dev.off()

    } else if (nrow(sub_mat) == 1) {

        png_file_single <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_single_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_single <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_single_unique.pdf"))

        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase peptides —", batch, "(single unique peptide)"),
                 filename=png_file_single, width=8, height=3)

        pdf(pdf_file_single, width=8, height=3)
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase peptides —", batch, "(single unique peptide)"))
        dev.off()
    }

    # --- Export normalized peptide table ---
    out_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("normalized_peptides_", batch, "_", san(var_id), "_unique.tsv"))
    fwrite(out_tab, out_path, sep="\t")
    message("💾 Exported normalized unique-peptide table → ", normalizePath(out_path))
}

message("\n🎯 Completed peptide-level normalization for all batches (unique peptides only + PDF heatmaps).")


#N1.HOG0038129
# =============================================================
# PEPTIDE PIPELINE — Multi-batch, adaptive correction, TSN, smoothing,
# with z-scored and non-z-scored heatmaps per variety (unique peptides only + PDF export)
# =============================================================

# ---------------------- USER PARAMETERS ----------------------
pept_dir   <- "../../../R_import/Hv4/MW_pipe/peptides"
out_base   <- "../../../R_export/Hv4/peptides_HOG0038129"
dir.create(normalizePath(out_base, mustWork = FALSE), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ortho_file <- "../../../R_Data/Hv4/single_inter/Hv4_allBatches_interBatchNorm.csv"
target_hog <- "N1.HOG0038129"
min_val       <- 0.1
missing_limit <- 9
smooth_k      <- 3

# =============================================================
# STEP 1 — Load ortholog mapping for the target HOG
# =============================================================
message("📂 Loading ortholog mapping from: ", ortho_file)
full_ortho <- fread(ortho_file)

id_cols <- grep("_protein_ID$", names(full_ortho), value = TRUE)
subset_dt <- full_ortho[, c("HOG", id_cols), with = FALSE]
result <- subset_dt[HOG == target_hog]
if (nrow(result) == 0) stop("❌ Target HOG not found in ortholog table.")
message("✅ Found entry for ", target_hog)

# =============================================================
# STEP 2 — Define file–variety–protein mapping
# =============================================================
file_variety_map <- data.table(
    File = c(
        "peptides_b1", "peptides_b2", "peptides_b3", "peptides_b4", "peptides_b5",
        "peptides_b6", "peptides_b7", "peptides_b8", "peptides_b9", "peptides_b10",
        "peptides_b11", "peptides_b12", "peptides_b13", "peptides_b14", "peptides_b15",
        "peptides_b16", "peptides_b17", "peptides_b18", "peptides_b19", "peptides_b20"
    ),
    Variety = c(
        "RGT","ACCO","SLA","OUN","AA","DUL","VAL","MIL","137","PED",
        "BAR","PRO","DIA","MOR","TRU","FT11","OPA","ALE","KRO","HAN"
    )
)

protein_cols <- names(result)[grepl("_protein_ID$", names(result))]
variety_from_result <- sub("_protein_ID$", "", protein_cols)
variety_protein_map <- data.table(
    Variety = variety_from_result,
    Protein_ID = as.character(result[1, ..protein_cols])
)

variety_map_full <- merge(file_variety_map, variety_protein_map, by = "Variety", all.x = TRUE)
qc_path <- file.path(out_base, "QC_file_variety_protein_map.csv")
fwrite(variety_map_full, qc_path)
message("✅ Variety-to-protein mapping saved to ", qc_path)

file2batch  <- setNames(variety_map_full$Variety, gsub("^peptides_", "", variety_map_full$File))
variety2prot <- setNames(variety_map_full$Protein_ID, variety_map_full$Variety)

# =============================================================
# STEP 3 — Processing configuration
# =============================================================
batch_thresholds <- list(
    "RGT"=2,"ACCO"=2,"AA"=2,"DUL"=1.8,"VAL"=2,"MIL"=2,"PED"=1.8,"PRO"=2,
    "DIA"=3.5,"MOR"=1.6,"ALE"=2,"KRO"=1.8,"HAN"=1.8,"SLA"=3,"OUN"=2,
    "BAR"=1.8,"TRU"=2,"FT11"=2.5,"OPA"=1.8,"137"=1.6
)

batch_specific_rules <- list(
    "ACCO"=list(list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6))),
    "TRU" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6)),
                list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "RGT" =list(list(target=1, neighbors=c(2))),
    "PRO" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4))),
    "DUL" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "MOR" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "PED" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "OPA" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "137" =list(list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "HAN" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "DIA" =list(list(target=2, neighbors=c(1,3))),
    "KRO" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3,6)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(3,6)))
)

batches_1to9  <- c("b1","b3","b5","b7","b9","b11","b13","b15","b17","b19")
batches_10to18 <- c("b2","b4","b6","b8","b10","b12","b14","b16","b18","b20")

# =============================================================
# STEP 4 — Helper functions
# =============================================================
san <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)
edge_ma <- function(x, k=3){
    if (all(is.na(x))) return(x)
    h <- floor(k/2)
    x_ext <- c(rep(x[1], h), x, rep(x[length(x)], h))
    y <- stats::filter(x_ext, rep(1/k, k), sides=2)
    as.numeric(y[(h+1):(length(y)-h)])
}
smooth_matrix <- function(mat, k=3) t(apply(mat, 1, edge_ma, k=k))
select_batch_channels <- function(dt, stem) {
    if (stem %in% batches_1to9) {
        message("📥 Selecting columns: Reporter.intensity.corrected.[1–9]")
        cols <- grep("Reporter.intensity.corrected.[1-9]", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    } else if (stem %in% batches_10to18) {
        message("📥 Selecting columns: Reporter.intensity.corrected.1[0–8]")
        cols <- grep("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1[0-8]", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    } else stop("❌ Unknown batch: ", stem)
    cols[1:min(length(cols),9)]
}

# =============================================================
# STEP 5 — Main processing loop
# =============================================================
pept_files <- list.files(pept_dir, pattern="^peptides_b.*\\.txt$", full.names=TRUE)
message("Detected ", length(pept_files), " peptide files.")
if (!length(pept_files)) stop("❌ No peptide files found at ", normalizePath(pept_dir))

for (fp in pept_files) {
    message("\n--------------------------------")
    message("📄 File: ", basename(fp))
    dt <- fread(fp, sep="\t", header=TRUE, quote="", data.table=TRUE)
    if (!"Proteins" %in% names(dt)) { message("⚠️ No 'Proteins' column — skipped."); next }

    stem  <- tolower(gsub("^peptides_|\\.txt$", "", basename(fp)))
    batch <- file2batch[[stem]]
    if (is.null(batch)) { message("⚠️ No variety mapping for ", stem); next }

    var_id <- variety2prot[[batch]]

    # 🚨 ADDED SAFETY CHECK: skip empty protein IDs
    if (is.null(var_id) || is.na(var_id) || var_id == "") {
        message("❌ Missing or empty Protein ID for ", batch, " — skipping.")
        next
    }

    thr   <- batch_thresholds[[batch]]; if (is.null(thr)) thr <- 2
    rules <- batch_specific_rules[[batch]]
    message("🔍 Variety: ", batch, " → Protein ID: ", var_id)

    chans_raw <- select_batch_channels(dt, stem)
    message("✅ Channels:\n   ", paste(chans_raw, collapse="\n   "))
    setnames(dt, chans_raw, paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw)))
    chans <- paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw))

    keep <- apply(dt[, ..chans], 1, function(x) sum(is.na(x) | x < min_val) < missing_limit)
    dt <- dt[keep]; if (!nrow(dt)) next

    dt[, ProteinCount := lengths(strsplit(Proteins, ";"))]
    dt <- dt[ProteinCount == 1]
    dt[, ProteinCount := NULL]
    message("✅ Retained ", nrow(dt), " unique peptides (1 protein only)")
    if (!nrow(dt)) { message("⚠️ No unique peptides found — skipping."); next }

    mat <- as.matrix(dt[, ..chans]); mode(mat) <- "numeric"

    n_imp <- 0; n_rep <- 0
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(mat))) {
        row <- mat[i,]
        if (!is.null(rules)) {
            for (r in rules) {
                t <- r$target; neigh <- row[r$neighbors]
                neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh>0]
                if (length(neigh)) {
                    mu <- mean(neigh)
                    val <- row[t]
                    if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                        row[t] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp + 1
                    } else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) {
                        row[t] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep + 1
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        target_idx <- if (is.null(rules)) integer(0) else vapply(rules, `[[`, numeric(1), "target")
        for (j in seq_along(row)) {
            if (j %in% target_idx) next
            neigh <- row[intersect(c(j-1,j+1), seq_along(row))]
            neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh > 0]
            if (!length(neigh)) next
            mu <- mean(neigh)
            val <- row[j]
            if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                row[j] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp + 1
            } else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) {
                row[j] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep + 1
            }
        }

        mat[i,] <- row
    }

    message(sprintf("✅ %s — Corrected: %d (imputed %d, replaced %d)", batch, n_imp+n_rep, n_imp, n_rep))

    col_sums <- colSums(mat, na.rm=TRUE)
    gm <- median(col_sums, na.rm=TRUE)
    fac <- gm / col_sums
    for (j in seq_along(chans)) mat[,j] <- mat[,j] * fac[j]
    message("✅ TSN applied.")

    mat <- smooth_matrix(mat, k=smooth_k)
    message("✨ Edge-replicated moving-average smoothing applied (k=3)")

    out_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(out_base, batch, san(var_id)), mustWork=FALSE)
    dir.create(out_dir, recursive=TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
    if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) stop("❌ Cannot create output folder: ", out_dir)

    hit <- grepl(var_id, dt$Proteins, fixed=TRUE)
    n_hit <- sum(hit)
    message("🔎 Found ", n_hit, " unique peptides for ", var_id)
    if (n_hit == 0) next

    sub_mat <- log2(mat[hit,,drop=FALSE] + 1)
    rownames(sub_mat) <- make.unique(dt$Sequence[hit])
    meta_cols <- intersect(c("Sequence","Proteins","Leading razor protein",
                             "Start position","End position"), names(dt))
    sub_meta <- dt[hit, ..meta_cols]
    out_tab <- cbind(sub_meta, as.data.table(sub_mat))

    # --- Heatmaps (PNG + PDF)
    heat_cols <- colorRampPalette(c("#4579F1","white","#D73020"))(130)
    if (nrow(sub_mat) >= 2) {
        png_file_z <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_zscore_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_z <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_zscore_unique.pdf"))
        ph_z <- pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="row", cluster_rows=TRUE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                         color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                         main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, var_id),
                         filename=png_file_z, width=10, height=8)

        pdf(pdf_file_z, width=10, height=8)
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="row", cluster_rows=TRUE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, var_id))
        dev.off()

        row_order <- if (!is.null(ph_z$tree_row$order))
            rownames(sub_mat)[ph_z$tree_row$order]
        else rownames(sub_mat)
        hm_mat <- sub_mat[row_order,,drop=FALSE]

        png_file_noz <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_noZ_sameOrder_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_noz <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_noZ_sameOrder_unique.pdf"))
        pheatmap(hm_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, "(no z-score, same order)"),
                 filename=png_file_noz, width=10, height=8)

        pdf(pdf_file_noz, width=10, height=8)
        pheatmap(hm_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, "(no z-score, same order)"))
        dev.off()

    } else if (nrow(sub_mat) == 1) {

        png_file_single <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_single_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_single <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_single_unique.pdf"))

        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase peptides —", batch, "(single unique peptide)"),
                 filename=png_file_single, width=8, height=3)

        pdf(pdf_file_single, width=8, height=3)
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase peptides —", batch, "(single unique peptide)"))
        dev.off()
    }

    # --- Export normalized peptide table ---
    out_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("normalized_peptides_", batch, "_", san(var_id), "_unique.tsv"))
    fwrite(out_tab, out_path, sep="\t")
    message("💾 Exported normalized unique-peptide table → ", normalizePath(out_path))
}

message("\n🎯 Completed peptide-level normalization for all batches (unique peptides only + PDF heatmaps).")




#N1.HOG0031823

# =============================================================
# PEPTIDE PIPELINE — Multi-batch, adaptive correction, TSN, smoothing,
# with z-scored and non-z-scored heatmaps per variety (unique peptides only + PDF export)
# =============================================================

# ---------------------- USER PARAMETERS ----------------------
pept_dir   <- "../../../R_import/Hv4/MW_pipe/peptides"
out_base   <- "../../../R_export/Hv4/peptides_HOG0031823"

dir.create(normalizePath(out_base, mustWork = FALSE), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ortho_file <- "../../../R_Data/Hv4/single_inter/Hv4_allBatches_interBatchNorm.csv"
target_hog <- "N1.HOG0031823"
min_val       <- 0.1
missing_limit <- 9
smooth_k      <- 3

# =============================================================
# STEP 1 — Load ortholog mapping for the target HOG
# =============================================================
message("📂 Loading ortholog mapping from: ", ortho_file)
full_ortho <- fread(ortho_file)

id_cols <- grep("_protein_ID$", names(full_ortho), value = TRUE)
subset_dt <- full_ortho[, c("HOG", id_cols), with = FALSE]
result <- subset_dt[HOG == target_hog]
if (nrow(result) == 0) stop("❌ Target HOG not found in ortholog table.")
message("✅ Found entry for ", target_hog)

# =============================================================
# STEP 2 — Define file–variety–protein mapping
# =============================================================
file_variety_map <- data.table(
    File = c(
        "peptides_b1", "peptides_b2", "peptides_b3", "peptides_b4", "peptides_b5",
        "peptides_b6", "peptides_b7", "peptides_b8", "peptides_b9", "peptides_b10",
        "peptides_b11", "peptides_b12", "peptides_b13", "peptides_b14", "peptides_b15",
        "peptides_b16", "peptides_b17", "peptides_b18", "peptides_b19", "peptides_b20"
    ),
    Variety = c(
        "RGT","ACCO","SLA","OUN","AA","DUL","VAL","MIL","137","PED",
        "BAR","PRO","DIA","MOR","TRU","FT11","OPA","ALE","KRO","HAN"
    )
)

protein_cols <- names(result)[grepl("_protein_ID$", names(result))]
variety_from_result <- sub("_protein_ID$", "", protein_cols)
variety_protein_map <- data.table(
    Variety = variety_from_result,
    Protein_ID = as.character(result[1, ..protein_cols])
)

variety_map_full <- merge(file_variety_map, variety_protein_map, by = "Variety", all.x = TRUE)
qc_path <- file.path(out_base, "QC_file_variety_protein_map.csv")
fwrite(variety_map_full, qc_path)
message("✅ Variety-to-protein mapping saved to ", qc_path)

file2batch  <- setNames(variety_map_full$Variety, gsub("^peptides_", "", variety_map_full$File))
variety2prot <- setNames(variety_map_full$Protein_ID, variety_map_full$Variety)

# =============================================================
# STEP 3 — Processing configuration
# =============================================================
batch_thresholds <- list(
    "RGT"=2,"ACCO"=2,"AA"=2,"DUL"=1.8,"VAL"=2,"MIL"=2,"PED"=1.8,"PRO"=2,
    "DIA"=3.5,"MOR"=1.6,"ALE"=2,"KRO"=1.8,"HAN"=1.8,"SLA"=3,"OUN"=
    "BAR"=1.8,"TRU"=2,"FT11"=2.5,"OPA"=1.8,"137"=1.6
)

batch_specific_rules <- list(
    "ACCO"=list(list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6))),
    "TRU" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6)),
                list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "RGT" =list(list(target=1, neighbors=c(2))),
    "PRO" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4))),
    "DUL" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "MOR" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "PED" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "OPA" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "137" =list(list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "HAN" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "DIA" =list(list(target=2, neighbors=c(1,3))),
    "KRO" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3,6)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(3,6)))
)

batches_1to9  <- c("b1","b3","b5","b7","b9","b11","b13","b15","b17","b19")
batches_10to18 <- c("b2","b4","b6","b8","b10","b12","b14","b16","b18","b20")

# =============================================================
# STEP 4 — Helper functions
# =============================================================
san <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)
edge_ma <- function(x, k=3){
    if (all(is.na(x))) return(x)
    h <- floor(k/2)
    x_ext <- c(rep(x[1], h), x, rep(x[length(x)], h))
    y <- stats::filter(x_ext, rep(1/k, k), sides=2)
    as.numeric(y[(h+1):(length(y)-h)])
}
smooth_matrix <- function(mat, k=3) t(apply(mat, 1, edge_ma, k=k))
select_batch_channels <- function(dt, stem) {
    if (stem %in% batches_1to9) {
        message("📥 Selecting columns: Reporter.intensity.corrected.[1–9]")
        cols <- grep("Reporter.intensity.corrected.[1-9]", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    } else if (stem %in% batches_10to18) {
        message("📥 Selecting columns: Reporter.intensity.corrected.1[0–8]")
        cols <- grep("Reporter.intensity.corrected.1[0-8]", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    } else stop("❌ Unknown batch: ", stem)
    cols[1:min(length(cols),9)]
}

# =============================================================
# STEP 5 — Main processing loop
# =============================================================
pept_files <- list.files(pept_dir, pattern="^peptides_b.*\\.txt$", full.names=TRUE)
message("Detected ", length(pept_files), " peptide files.")
if (!length(pept_files)) stop("❌ No peptide files found at ", normalizePath(pept_dir))

for (fp in pept_files) {
    message("\n--------------------------------")
    message("📄 File: ", basename(fp))
    dt <- fread(fp, sep="\t", header=TRUE, quote="", data.table=TRUE)
    if (!"Proteins" %in% names(dt)) { message("⚠️ No 'Proteins' column — skipped."); next }

    stem  <- tolower(gsub("^peptides_|\\.txt$", "", basename(fp)))
    batch <- file2batch[[stem]]
    if (is.null(batch)) { message("⚠️ No variety mapping for ", stem); next }

    var_id <- variety2prot[[batch]]

    # 🚨 ADDED SAFETY CHECK: skip empty protein IDs
    if (is.null(var_id) || is.na(var_id) || var_id == "") {
        message("❌ Missing or empty Protein ID for ", batch, " — skipping.")
        next
    }

    thr   <- batch_thresholds[[batch]]; if (is.null(thr)) thr <- 2
    rules <- batch_specific_rules[[batch]]
    message("🔍 Variety: ", batch, " → Protein ID: ", var_id)

    chans_raw <- select_batch_channels(dt, stem)
    message("✅ Channels:\n   ", paste(chans_raw, collapse="\n   "))
    setnames(dt, chans_raw, paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw)))
    chans <- paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw))

    keep <- apply(dt[, ..chans], 1, function(x) sum(is.na(x) | x < min_val) < missing_limit)
    dt <- dt[keep]; if (!nrow(dt)) next

    dt[, ProteinCount := lengths(strsplit(Proteins, ";"))]
    dt <- dt[ProteinCount == 1]
    dt[, ProteinCount := NULL]
    message("✅ Retained ", nrow(dt), " unique peptides (1 protein only)")
    if (!nrow(dt)) { message("⚠️ No unique peptides found — skipping."); next }

    mat <- as.matrix(dt[, ..chans]); mode(mat) <- "numeric"

    n_imp <- 0; n_rep <- 0
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(mat))) {
        row <- mat[i,]
        if (!is.null(rules)) {
            for (r in rules) {
                t <- r$target; neigh <- row[r$neighbors]
                neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh>0]
                if (length(neigh)) {
                    mu <- mean(neigh)
                    val <- row[t]
                    if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                        row[t] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp + 1
                    } else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) {
                        row[t] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep + 1
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        target_idx <- if (is.null(rules)) integer(0) else vapply(rules, `[[`, numeric(1), "target")
        for (j in seq_along(row)) {
            if (j %in% target_idx) next
            neigh <- row[intersect(c(j-1,j+1), seq_along(row))]
            neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh > 0]
            if (!length(neigh)) next
            mu <- mean(neigh)
            val <- row[j]
            if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                row[j] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp + 1
            } else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) {
                row[j] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep + 1
            }
        }

        mat[i,] <- row
    }

    message(sprintf("✅ %s — Corrected: %d (imputed %d, replaced %d)", batch, n_imp+n_rep, n_imp, n_rep))

    col_sums <- colSums(mat, na.rm=TRUE)
    gm <- median(col_sums, na.rm=TRUE)
    fac <- gm / col_sums
    for (j in seq_along(chans)) mat[,j] <- mat[,j] * fac[j]
    message("✅ TSN applied.")

    mat <- smooth_matrix(mat, k=smooth_k)
    message("✨ Edge-replicated moving-average smoothing applied (k=3)")

    out_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(out_base, batch, san(var_id)), mustWork=FALSE)
    dir.create(out_dir, recursive=TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
    if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) stop("❌ Cannot create output folder: ", out_dir)

    hit <- grepl(var_id, dt$Proteins, fixed=TRUE)
    n_hit <- sum(hit)
    message("🔎 Found ", n_hit, " unique peptides for ", var_id)
    if (n_hit == 0) next

    sub_mat <- log2(mat[hit,,drop=FALSE] + 1)
    rownames(sub_mat) <- make.unique(dt$Sequence[hit])
    meta_cols <- intersect(c("Sequence","Proteins","Leading razor protein",
                             "Start position","End position"), names(dt))
    sub_meta <- dt[hit, ..meta_cols]
    out_tab <- cbind(sub_meta, as.data.table(sub_mat))

    # --- Heatmaps (PNG + PDF)
    heat_cols <- colorRampPalette(c("#4579F1","white","#D73020"))(130)
    if (nrow(sub_mat) >= 2) {
        png_file_z <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_zscore_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_z <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_zscore_unique.pdf"))
        ph_z <- pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="row", cluster_rows=TRUE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                         color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                         main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, var_id),
                         filename=png_file_z, width=10, height=8)

        pdf(pdf_file_z, width=10, height=8)
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="row", cluster_rows=TRUE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, var_id))
        dev.off()

        row_order <- if (!is.null(ph_z$tree_row$order))
            rownames(sub_mat)[ph_z$tree_row$order]
        else rownames(sub_mat)
        hm_mat <- sub_mat[row_order,,drop=FALSE]

        png_file_noz <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_noZ_sameOrder_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_noz <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_noZ_sameOrder_unique.pdf"))
        pheatmap(hm_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, "(no z-score, same order)"),
                 filename=png_file_noz, width=10, height=8)

        pdf(pdf_file_noz, width=10, height=8)
        pheatmap(hm_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE, fontsize=8, fontsize_col=10,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase unique peptides —", batch, "(no z-score, same order)"))
        dev.off()

    } else if (nrow(sub_mat) == 1) {

        png_file_single <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_single_unique.png"))
        pdf_file_single <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("heatmap_", batch, "_single_unique.pdf"))

        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase peptides —", batch, "(single unique peptide)"),
                 filename=png_file_single, width=8, height=3)

        pdf(pdf_file_single, width=8, height=3)
        pheatmap(sub_mat, scale="none", cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
                 color=heat_cols, show_rownames=TRUE,
                 main=paste("β-Amylase peptides —", batch, "(single unique peptide)"))
        dev.off()
    }

    # --- Export normalized peptide table ---
    out_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("normalized_peptides_", batch, "_", san(var_id), "_unique.tsv"))
    fwrite(out_tab, out_path, sep="\t")
    message("💾 Exported normalized unique-peptide table → ", normalizePath(out_path))
}

message("\n🎯 Completed peptide-level normalization for all batches (unique peptides only + PDF heatmaps).")




```

#Test on metaclusters from Kostas

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)

############################################
### 1. Define paths
############################################

metacluster_path <- "C:/Users/ghido/Downloads/common_ogs_with_7_metaclusters.csv"
ortho_path       <- "../../../R_Data/Hv4/func_anno2/full_ortho_annotated_postInter.csv"
tair_anno_path   <- "../../../R_import/Cam_At_project/Ortho_At_AtUP/UpAt_annotations.tsv"

############################################
### 2. Detect correct delimiter for metacluster file
############################################

read_metacluster_file <- function(path) {
    first_line <- readLines(path, n = 1)
    
    if (grepl("\t", first_line)) {
        delim <- "\t"
    } else if (grepl(";", first_line)) {
        delim <- ";"
    } else if (grepl(",", first_line)) {
        delim <- ","
    } else {
        stop("❌ Could not detect delimiter.")
    }
    
    message("📌 Detected metacluster delimiter: '", delim, "'")
    
    read_delim(path, delim = delim, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

############################################
### 3. Load metacluster file
############################################

common_ogs_df <- read_metacluster_file(metacluster_path)

message("📂 Columns detected in metacluster file:")
print(colnames(common_ogs_df))

# Identify orthogroup column (case flexible)
possible_cols <- c("Orthogroup", "orthogroup", "OG", "HOG", "hog")
og_col <- possible_cols[possible_cols %in% colnames(common_ogs_df)][1]

if (is.na(og_col)) stop("❌ No Orthogroup/OG/HOG column present!")

common_ogs_vec <- unique(common_ogs_df[[og_col]])

message("✅ Extracted ", length(common_ogs_vec), " unique orthogroups.\n")

############################################
### 4. Load full ortho annotation matrix
############################################

full_ortho_anno <- read_csv(ortho_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

############################################
### 5. Filter full matrix for selected orthogroups
############################################

filtered_ortho <- full_ortho_anno %>%
    filter(Orthogroup %in% common_ogs_vec)

message("📌 Filtered matrix contains ", nrow(filtered_ortho), " rows.\n")


###############################################################
### 6. LOAD TAIR ANNOTATION FILE AND MERGE INTO filtered_ortho
###############################################################

message("📥 Loading TAIR annotation file...")

At_UP_annotated <- read_tsv(tair_anno_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

UpAt_annotations_dist <- At_UP_annotated %>%
    distinct(TAIR, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
    mutate(TAIR = str_remove(TAIR, ";$"))

message("📌 TAIR annotation table loaded with ",
        nrow(UpAt_annotations_dist), " unique TAIR IDs.")

############################################
### 7. Merge using RGT_At_At2RGT column
############################################

if (!"RGT_At_At2RGT" %in% colnames(filtered_ortho)) {
    stop("❌ Column 'RGT_At_At2RGT' not found in filtered_ortho.")
}

filtered_ortho_anno <- filtered_ortho %>%
    left_join(
        UpAt_annotations_dist,
        by = c("RGT_At_Entry" = "Entry")
    )

message("✅ SUCCESS — TAIR annotations merged into filtered orthogroup matrix!\n")

############################################
### 8. Output
############################################

filtered_ortho_anno

```


Beta amylase stuff on semi specific 

```{r}
# =============================================================
# FULL PEPTIDE NORMALISATION PIPELINE (ALL PEPTIDES PER BATCH)
# — Keeps batch thresholds, batch-specific rules, TSN, smoothing
# — Removes protein/HOG selection, removes heatmaps
# =============================================================

library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(pheatmap)

# ---------------------- USER PARAMETERS ----------------------
base_dir <- "/media/kusterlab/users_files/Guido Giordano/R/R_import/Hv4/b_amy_stuff"

out_base <- "/media/kusterlab/users_files/Guido Giordano/R/R_export/Hv4/peptides_ALL_NORMALIZED"
dir.create(normalizePath(out_base, mustWork = FALSE), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

min_val       <- 0.1
missing_limit <- 9
smooth_k      <- 3

# =============================================================
# STEP 1 — Batch → variety mapping (needed for thresholds)
# =============================================================

file_variety_map <- data.table(
    File = c(
        "b1","b2","b3","b4","b5",
        "b6","b7","b8","b9","b10",
        "b11","b12","b13","b14","b15",
        "b16","b17","b18","b19","b20"
    ),
    Variety = c(
        "RGT","ACCO","SLA","OUN","AA",
        "DUL","VAL","MIL","137","PED",
        "BAR","PRO","DIA","MOR","TRU",
        "FT11","OPA","ALE","KRO","HAN"
    )
)

file2batch <- setNames(file_variety_map$Variety, file_variety_map$File)

# =============================================================
# STEP 2 — Batch thresholds and rules (unchanged)
# =============================================================

batch_thresholds <- list(
    "RGT"=2,"ACCO"=4,"AA"=2,"DUL"=1.8,"VAL"=2,"MIL"=4,"PED"=1.8,"PRO"=2,
    "DIA"=3.5,"MOR"=1.6,"ALE"=4,"KRO"=1.8,"HAN"=1.8,"SLA"=3,"OUN"=1.8,
    "BAR"=1.8,"TRU"=2,"FT11"=2.5,"OPA"=1.8,"137"=1.6
)
batch_specific_rules <- list(
    "ACCO"=list(list(target=5, neighbors=c(4,6))),
    "RGT" =list(list(target=1, neighbors=c(2))),
    "PRO" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2,4))),
    "DUL" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "MOR" =list(list(target=8, neighbors=c(7,9))),
    "PED" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "OPA" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "137" =list(list(target=6, neighbors=c(7)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(3)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(7))),
    "HAN" =list(list(target=3, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=4, neighbors=c(2)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(6))),
    "DIA" =list(list(target=2, neighbors=c(1,3))),
    "KRO" =list(list(target=4, neighbors=c(3,6)),
                list(target=5, neighbors=c(3,6)))
)

# batches that should use reporter channels 1–9 vs 10–18
batches_1to9  <- paste0("b", c(1,3,5,7,11,13,15,17,19))
batches_10to18 <- paste0("b", c(2,4,6,8,9,10,12,14,16,18,20))

# =============================================================
# STEP 3 — Helper functions
# =============================================================

san <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)

edge_ma <- function(x, k = 3) {
    if (all(is.na(x))) return(x)
    h <- floor(k/2)
    x_ext <- c(rep(x[1], h), x, rep(x[length(x)], h))
    y <- stats::filter(x_ext, rep(1/k, k), sides = 2)
    as.numeric(y[(h+1):(length(y)-h)])
}

smooth_matrix <- function(mat, k = 3) t(apply(mat, 1, edge_ma, k = k))

# --------- FIXED reporter-channel detector (uses 1–9 or 10–18) ----------
select_batch_channels <- function(dt, stem) {
    suffix_pattern <- paste0("Hv4_", stem, "_")
    
    # All corrected reporter channels for this batch (1..18)
    cand <- grep(
        paste0("^Reporter intensity corrected ([0-9]+) .*", suffix_pattern),
        names(dt),
        value = TRUE
    )
    if (length(cand) == 0) stop("No reporter channels for ", stem)
    
    # Extract numeric reporter index (1..18)
    idx <- as.numeric(sub("Reporter intensity corrected ([0-9]+).*", "\\1", cand))
    
    # Decide which 9-channel block to use
    if (stem %in% batches_1to9) {
        wanted <- 1:9
    } else if (stem %in% batches_10to18) {
        wanted <- 10:18
    } else {
        stop("Batch stem not recognized in 1–9 or 10–18 sets: ", stem)
    }
    
    use <- idx %in% wanted
    if (!any(use)) {
        stop("No reporter channels with indexes ", paste(wanted, collapse = ","), " found for ", stem)
    }
    
    # Keep only desired block and sort by reporter index
    cand_sel <- cand[use]
    idx_sel  <- idx[use]
    o <- order(idx_sel)
    cand_sel <- cand_sel[o]
    
    if (length(cand_sel) != 9) {
        warning("Batch ", stem, ": expected 9 reporter channels, found ", length(cand_sel))
    }
    
    cand_sel
}

# =============================================================
# STEP 4 — Detect peptide files
# =============================================================

batch_dirs <- list.dirs(base_dir, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)
pept_files <- file.path(batch_dirs, "peptides.txt")
pept_files <- pept_files[file.exists(pept_files)]

message("Found ", length(pept_files), " peptide files.")

# =============================================================
# STEP 5 — MAIN LOOP (INTRA-BATCH NORMALISATION)
# =============================================================

norm_list <- list()   # store batches in memory

for (fp in pept_files) {
    
    batch_name <- basename(dirname(fp))
    stem_num <- sub("Batch", "", batch_name)
    stem <- paste0("b", stem_num)
    
    message("\n-----------------------------------")
    message("Processing ", fp, "  (stem = ", stem, ")")
    
    dt <- fread(fp)
    
    batch <- file2batch[[stem]]
    thr <- batch_thresholds[[batch]]
    if (is.null(thr)) thr <- 2
    rules <- batch_specific_rules[[batch]]
    
    chans_raw <- select_batch_channels(dt, stem)
    setnames(dt, chans_raw, paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw)))
    chans <- paste0("Ch", seq_along(chans_raw))
    
    keep <- apply(dt[, ..chans], 1,
                  function(x) sum(is.na(x) | x < min_val) < missing_limit)
    dt <- dt[keep]
    if (!nrow(dt)) next
    
    mat <- as.matrix(dt[, ..chans]); mode(mat) <- "numeric"
    
    # ---------------- ADAPTIVE CORRECTION ----------------
    n_imp <- 0
    n_rep <- 0
    
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(mat))) {
        row <- mat[i,]
        
        if (!is.null(rules)) {
            for (r in rules) {
                t <- r$target
                neigh <- row[r$neighbors]
                neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh > 0]
                if (length(neigh)) {
                    mu <- mean(neigh)
                    val <- row[t]
                    if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                        row[t] <- mu; n_imp <- n_imp+1
                    } else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) {
                        row[t] <- mu; n_rep <- n_rep+1
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        target_idx <- if (is.null(rules)) integer(0)
                      else vapply(rules, `[[`, numeric(1), "target")
        
        for (j in seq_along(row)) {
            if (j %in% target_idx) next
            neigh <- row[intersect(c(j-1,j+1), seq_along(row))]
            neigh <- neigh[is.finite(neigh) & neigh > 0]
            if (!length(neigh)) next
            mu <- mean(neigh)
            val <- row[j]
            if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                row[j] <- mu; n_imp<-n_imp+1
            } else if (abs(log2((val+1)/(mu+1))) > thr) {
                row[j] <- mu; n_rep<-n_rep+1
            }
        }
        
        mat[i,] <- row
    }
    
    message(sprintf("Corrected: %d imputed, %d replaced", n_imp, n_rep))
    
    # ---------------- TSN (INTRA-BATCH) ----------------
    col_sums <- colSums(mat, na.rm=TRUE)
    gm <- median(col_sums)
    fac <- gm / col_sums
    mat <- sweep(mat, 2, fac, "*")
    
    # ---------------- SMOOTHING ----------------
    mat <- smooth_matrix(mat, k = smooth_k)
    
    # store in memory instead of exporting
    norm_list[[stem]] <- cbind(dt[, !..chans], as.data.table(mat))
}

# =============================================================
# INTER-BATCH MEDIAN CENTERING
# =============================================================

cat("\n--- Performing inter-batch median centering ---\n")

batch_medians <- vapply(norm_list, function(dt) {
    num_cols <- grep("^Ch[0-9]+$", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    vals <- unlist(dt[, ..num_cols], use.names = FALSE)
    vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]
    if (!length(vals)) return(NA_real_)
    median(vals)
}, numeric(1))

grand_median <- median(batch_medians, na.rm = TRUE)
cor_factors  <- grand_median / batch_medians

print(cor_factors)

# apply correction
for (b in names(norm_list)) {
    f <- cor_factors[b]
    dt <- norm_list[[b]]
    num_cols <- grep("^Ch[0-9]+$", names(dt), value = TRUE)
    
    dt[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, function(x) x * f),
       .SDcols = num_cols]
    
    norm_list[[b]] <- dt
}

cat("✅ Inter-batch normalization complete.\n")

# =============================================================
# EXPORT
# =============================================================

for (b in names(norm_list)) {
    out_file <- file.path(out_base,
                          paste0("normalized_peptides_", b, ".tsv"))
    fwrite(norm_list[[b]], out_file, sep="\t")
    message("Saved: ", normalizePath(out_file, winslash = "/"))
}

message("\n🎯 Completed full peptide normalization (intra + inter batch).")

# =============================================================
# Load normalized peptides
# =============================================================
norm_dir <- "Z:/PhD Munchen/Guido personal PhD Project_1/Barley germination proteome/Resources for Data analysis/R/R_export/Hv4/peptides_ALL_NORMALIZED"

norm_files <- list.files(norm_dir, pattern = "^normalized_peptides_.*\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
message("Found ", length(norm_files), " normalized peptide files.")

extract_stem <- function(path) {
    fname <- basename(path)
    sub("normalized_peptides_(b[0-9]+)\\.tsv", "\\1", fname)
}

all_norm_peptides <- lapply(norm_files, fread)
names(all_norm_peptides) <- vapply(norm_files, extract_stem, FUN.VALUE = character(1))

message("Loaded batches: ", paste(names(all_norm_peptides), collapse = ", "))

# =============================================================
# Define peptide sequence per batch (important!)
# =============================================================

# Default peptide
default_peptide <- "GPTGGMGGQAEDPTSGMGGELPATM"

# Batch-specific variants
peptide_per_batch <- list(
    b16 = "GPTGGMGGQAEDPTSGMGGELLATM",  # FT11 variant
    b5  = "GPTGGMGGQAEDPTSGIGGELPATM",
    b8  = "GPTGGMGGQAEDPTSGIGGELPATM"
)

get_peptide <- function(batch) {
    if (batch %in% names(peptide_per_batch)) {
        peptide_per_batch[[batch]]
    } else {
        default_peptide
    }
}

# =============================================================
# Helper: propagate 0 / NA between neighbours along V1..V9
# =============================================================

propagate_missing <- function(x) {
    n <- length(x)
    # Treat 0 as missing for propagation
    x[!is.na(x) & x == 0] <- NA
    
    # Forward pass
    for (i in 2:n) {
        if (is.na(x[i]) && !is.na(x[i-1])) {
            x[i] <- x[i-1]
        }
    }
    # Backward pass
    for (i in (n-1):1) {
        if (is.na(x[i]) && !is.na(x[i+1])) {
            x[i] <- x[i+1]
        }
    }
    x
}

# =============================================================
# Extract values across batches
# =============================================================

# Original list of batches
batch_names <- names(all_norm_peptides)

# --- your precise custom order ---
custom_order <- c(
    "b16","b6","b4","b5","b9",
    "b20","b10","b12","b13","b7",
    "b8","b17","b15","b19","b18","b14",
    "b11","b3","b1","b2"
)

# Keep only batches that exist (prevents errors)
batch_names <- intersect(custom_order, batch_names)

# Apply your exact order
batch_names <- factor(batch_names, levels = custom_order)
batch_names <- as.character(batch_names)

# Create matrix with custom ordered batches
pep_mat_raw <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(batch_names), ncol = 9,
                      dimnames = list(batch_names, paste0("V", 1:9)))

for (b in batch_names) {
    
    dt <- all_norm_peptides[[b]]
    target_peptide <- get_peptide(b)
    
    hit <- dt[Sequence == target_peptide]
    
    if (nrow(hit) == 0) {
        message("Peptide ", target_peptide, " not found in ", b, " → all NA.")
        next
    }
    
    vals <- as.numeric(hit[, paste0("V", 1:9), with = FALSE])
    
    vals_filled <- propagate_missing(vals)
    
    pep_mat_raw[b, ] <- vals_filled
}

# =============================================================
# Build log2 matrix AFTER propagation + RENAME ROWS & COLUMNS
# =============================================================

# 1) Compute log2 normalised matrix
pep_mat_log2 <- log2(pep_mat_raw + 1)

# 2) Rename V1..V9 → time points (0h–96h in 12h steps)
time_points <- c("0h","12h","24h","36h","48h","60h","72h","84h","96h")
colnames(pep_mat_log2) <- time_points
colnames(pep_mat_raw)  <- time_points

# 3) Rename batch rows → variety names
variety_names <- file2batch[batch_names]

rownames(pep_mat_log2) <- variety_names
rownames(pep_mat_raw)  <- variety_names

# 4) Build data frames
pep_df_raw  <- as.data.frame(pep_mat_raw)
pep_df_log2 <- as.data.frame(pep_mat_log2)

pep_df_raw$Variety  <- rownames(pep_df_raw)
pep_df_log2$Variety <- rownames(pep_df_log2)

# =============================================================
# Heatmap (now with time points + variety names)
# =============================================================

mat <- pep_mat_log2   # rows already renamed and ordered

heat_cols <- colorRampPalette(c("#89aee6", "white", "#D73027"))(200)

pheatmap(
    mat,
    color        = heat_cols,
    scale        = "row",
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    fontsize_row = 10,
    fontsize_col = 10,
    main         = "Peptide abundance across varieties (log2 normalized, gap-filled)"
)


```













#metacluster test from kostas

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)

############################################
### 1. Define paths
############################################

metacluster_path <- "C:/Users/ghido/Downloads/common_ogs_with_7_metaclusters.csv"
ortho_path       <- "../../../R_Data/Hv4/func_anno2/full_ortho_annotated_postInter.csv"
tair_anno_path   <- "../../../R_import/Cam_At_project/Ortho_At_AtUP/UpAt_annotations.tsv"

############################################
### 2. Detect correct delimiter for metacluster file
############################################

read_metacluster_file <- function(path) {
    first_line <- readLines(path, n = 1)
    
    if (grepl("\t", first_line)) {
        delim <- "\t"
    } else if (grepl(";", first_line)) {
        delim <- ";"
    } else if (grepl(",", first_line)) {
        delim <- ","
    } else {
        stop("❌ Could not detect delimiter.")
    }
    
    message("📌 Detected metacluster delimiter: '", delim, "'")
    
    read_delim(path, delim = delim, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

############################################
### 3. Load metacluster file
############################################

common_ogs_df <- read_metacluster_file(metacluster_path)

message("📂 Columns detected in metacluster file:")
print(colnames(common_ogs_df))

# Identify orthogroup column
possible_cols <- c("Orthogroup", "orthogroup", "OG", "HOG", "hog")
og_col <- possible_cols[possible_cols %in% colnames(common_ogs_df)][1]

if (is.na(og_col)) stop("❌ No Orthogroup/OG/HOG column present!")

common_ogs_vec <- unique(common_ogs_df[[og_col]])

message("✅ Extracted ", length(common_ogs_vec), " unique orthogroups.\n")

############################################
### 4. Load full ortho annotation matrix
############################################

full_ortho_anno <- read_csv(ortho_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

############################################
### 5. Filter full matrix for selected orthogroups
############################################

filtered_ortho <- full_ortho_anno %>%
    filter(Orthogroup %in% common_ogs_vec)

message("📌 Filtered matrix contains ", nrow(filtered_ortho), " rows.\n")

###############################################################
### 6. LOAD TAIR ANNOTATION FILE AND MERGE INTO filtered_ortho
###############################################################

message("📥 Loading TAIR annotation file...")

At_UP_annotated <- read_tsv(tair_anno_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

UpAt_annotations_dist <- At_UP_annotated %>%
    distinct(TAIR, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
    mutate(TAIR = str_remove(TAIR, ";$"))

message("📌 TAIR annotation table loaded with ",
        nrow(UpAt_annotations_dist), " unique TAIR IDs.")

############################################
### 7. Merge using RGT_At_Entry column
############################################

if (!"RGT_At_At2RGT" %in% colnames(filtered_ortho)) {
    stop("❌ Column 'RGT_At_At2RGT' not found in filtered_ortho.")
}

filtered_ortho_anno <- filtered_ortho %>%
    left_join(
        UpAt_annotations_dist,
        by = c("RGT_At_Entry" = "Entry")
    )

message("✅ SUCCESS — TAIR annotations merged into filtered orthogroup matrix!\n")

############################################
### 8. Output merged table
############################################

filtered_ortho_anno


############################################
### GO ENRICHMENT PART
############################################

library(tidyverse)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.At.tair.db)

############################################
### Extract and clean TAIR IDs
############################################

tair_raw <- filtered_ortho_anno$TAIR

tair_clean <- tair_raw[!is.na(tair_raw) & tair_raw != ""]
tair_split <- str_split(tair_clean, ";")
tair_vec <- unique(unlist(tair_split))

message("👉 Using ", length(tair_vec), " TAIR IDs for GO enrichment.")

############################################
### GO enrichment (BP)
############################################

ego <- enrichGO(
    gene          = tair_vec,
    OrgDb         = org.At.tair.db,
    keyType       = "TAIR",
    ont           = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff  = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff  = 0.2,
    readable      = TRUE
)

############################################
### Print results
############################################

print(head(ego, 20))

############################################
### Plot
############################################

dotplot(ego, showCategory = 20, font.size = 12) +
    ggtitle("GO Enrichment (Biological Process) for Filtered TAIR IDs")

library(ggplot2)

# Create the plot
p <- dotplot(ego, showCategory = 20, font.size = 12) +
    ggtitle("GOBP for shared Orthos")

# Save location
out_path <- "../../../R_export/Hv4/metaclusters/GO_enrichment_dotplot.png"

# Save the plot
ggsave(
    filename = out_path,
    plot = p,
    width = 10,      # inches
    height = 8,      # inches
    dpi = 300
)

message("Plot saved at: ", out_path)


```
